wt

wt

git worktrees, ergonomically.

Open a repository to see its worktrees. They all live in one predictable place: <repo>.worktrees/, right next to the main checkout.

wt keeps all worktrees in so they're easy to find. Moving them is safe: git updates its bookkeeping for you.

New worktree

Remove worktree ?

It has uncommitted changes:

    Rename worktree
